issues.sample: Motorcycle had a sudden engine knock causing catastrophic engine failure after going over a abutment. Issue found to be a broken connection rods. No warning lights, clear traffic, happened at 3:30 in the morning.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Aprilia Rs 660 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (100% of reports).
